releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.3.0

新功能
- 数据源连接支持自定义连接参数（MySQL/PostgreSQL/Redis/OceanBase），可配置 SSL、超时等选项
- 新增运行时日志记录，所有错误和警告自动写入日志文件
- 设置页面新增「打开日志目录」按钮，方便排查问题
- 前端错误自动转发到后端日志
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.3.0

New Features
- Data source connections support custom connection parameters (MySQL/PostgreSQL/Redis/OceanBase) for SSL, timeout, etc.
- Runtime logging: errors and warnings are automatically written to log files
- Added "Open Logs Directory" button in Settings for easier troubleshooting
- Frontend errors are automatically forwarded to backend logs
